codeReview.summary: The feature satisfies the milestone tracking requirement by creating a single dedicated `docs/frontend-update-v2/` review surface, populating it with per-feature auth/admin/lifecycle notes, and linking `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` back to the tracker. The README explicitly distinguishes required follow-up from explicit no-op entries, records the one retired alias migration note, and includes the later masked-target refinement so reviewers can understand current frontend-facing behavior without reconstructing branch history. The change is documentation-only, consistent with the existing handoff notes, and validated by compile plus `gate-fast` reruns.

summary: PASS. `docs/frontend-update-v2/` now exists as the branch-wide frontend follow-up tracker, covers the reviewed hardening changes, and explicitly marks where no frontend work is required.
